patches.hypothesis: Redesigned the calculation of the middle index and added more test cases to handle edge cases. Removed hardcoded values and used more generic approaches.
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by the incorrect calculation of the middle index. The middle index should be calculated as the average of the start and end indices, but the code is using the start index and the end index of the previous period instead.

patches.hypothesis: the method was updating the indices incorrectly
